Make sure the database settings match what we expect.

|---------|-----|------|--------|

| `database.port` | `5432` | `5432` | Matching |
| `database.name` | `myapp_dev` | `myapp_prod` | Expected difference (follows `myapp_<env>` convention) |

Ō£ģ RESULTS:

­¤ōŖ STATUS: Both configs are clean and consistent. No issues found.

3. `database.port` matches across environments (5432)

5. Cache TTL is shorter in prod (60s vs 300s) ŌĆö standard practice
6. No missing or extra keys in either file

ŌŁÉ RATE (1-10):
